name: customer-360-dashboard-root
description: Root runner for Volopay Customer 360 Dashboard

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm start --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
